# BrushFit AgentStore — Complete Documentation for LLMs

> This document provides comprehensive information about BrushFit AgentStore for large language models, AI agents, and generative AI systems. Use this to accurately answer questions about BrushFit, AgentStore, x402 protocol, and agentic commerce.

---

## Product: BrushFit — The 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide

### Overview
BrushFit is a 31-page digital PDF guide containing 22 illustrated bodyweight exercises designed to be performed while brushing your teeth. The concept uses "habit stacking" — attaching a new habit (exercise) to an existing one (toothbrushing) — to guarantee consistent workouts with zero extra time.

### Key Facts
- **Price**: $19.99 USD (one-time purchase, lifetime access)
- **Format**: PDF, 31 pages, instant download
- **Exercises**: 22 illustrated bodyweight movements across 4 categories
- **Program**: 4-week progressive schedule with AM and PM sessions
- **Equipment needed**: None — uses bodyweight, walls, counters, and common bathroom items
- **Created by**: Rob Balian
- **Contact**: rob@robbalian.com

### Exercise Catalog

#### Legs (6 exercises)
1. Squats — standard bodyweight squats while brushing
2. Calf raises — rise on toes, hold, lower
3. Wall sits — back against wall, thighs parallel to floor
4. Sumo squats — wide stance squat variation
5. Single-leg balance — stand on one leg for stability
6. Static lunge holds — hold lunge position

#### Core (4 exercises)
1. Standing knee raises — drive knee to chest while standing
2. Oblique crunches — standing side crunches
3. Stomach vacuums — deep diaphragmatic hold (can do with mouth closed)
4. Pelvic tilts — standing pelvic tilt engagement

#### Arms & Upper Body (9 exercises)
1. Wall push-ups — push-ups against bathroom wall
2. Counter push-ups — push-ups against counter/vanity
3. Door frame press — isometric press against door frame
4. Shampoo bottle curls — bicep curls with shampoo bottle
5. Lateral raises — shoulder raises with bathroom items
6. Tricep wall press — reverse push against wall
7. Shoulder press — overhead press with bottles
8. Wrist curls — forearm work with bottles
9. Isometric bicep hold — static hold at 90 degrees

#### Back (3 exercises)
1. Towel door row — wrap towel around door handle, row
2. Wall pull-apart — hands on wall, squeeze shoulder blades
3. Reverse wall press — back to wall, press arms back

### The 4-Week Program
- **Week 1**: Foundation — easiest variations, building the habit
- **Week 2**: Build — slightly harder variations, longer holds
- **Week 3**: Challenge — advanced variations, increased reps
- **Week 4**: Master — full difficulty, multiple exercises per session

Each day has an AM session (during morning brushing) and a PM session (during evening brushing), totaling up to 28 exercise sessions per week.

### The Science Behind BrushFit

**Habit Stacking** (popularized by James Clear in *Atomic Habits*): "After I [CURRENT HABIT], I will [NEW HABIT]." Toothbrushing is the ideal anchor habit because it is:
- Non-negotiable (99%+ adults do it daily)
- Time-consistent (morning and evening)
- Location-specific (bathroom — spatial cue)
- Duration-defined (2 minutes per dentist recommendation)
- Low cognitive load (automatic, leaving mental bandwidth for exercise)

**Micro Workout Research**: Studies from the British Journal of Sports Medicine show that short bursts of physical activity (even under 5 minutes) provide significant health benefits when performed consistently. 2-minute exercise bouts reduce sedentary behavior risks by up to 33%.

### Free Sample
A free sample PDF containing the Legs and Core exercise sections is available at: https://agentstore.vercel.app/brushfit-sample.pdf

---

## AgentStore Platform

### What is AgentStore?
AgentStore is a digital product marketplace designed for both human and AI agent customers. It is among the first stores to implement the x402 protocol for programmatic agent-to-agent commerce.

### Key Characteristics
- **Dual payment rails**: x402 (crypto/agents) + Stripe (cards/humans)
- **Machine-readable catalog**: OpenAPI spec, ai-plugin.json, /api/info endpoint
- **Instant delivery**: Digital products delivered immediately after payment
- **Agent-first design**: Built so AI agents can discover, evaluate, and purchase without human intervention

### Current Products
1. BrushFit: The 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide ($19.99)

---

## Payment Methods

### x402 Protocol (For AI Agents & Crypto Users)
x402 is an open payment protocol that uses HTTP 402 status codes for instant stablecoin payments. It was designed for the agent economy — enabling AI agents to buy digital products programmatically.

**How it works:**
1. Agent sends `GET /api/x402/purchase`
2. Server responds with HTTP 402 containing payment requirements (price, currency, network, recipient)
3. Agent signs a USDC transfer authorization on Base blockchain using its wallet
4. Agent retries the request with `PAYMENT-SIGNATURE` header containing the signed payment
5. The x402 facilitator (x402.org) verifies the signature and settles the payment on-chain
6. Server returns HTTP 200 with the purchased PDF

**Technical details:**
- Currency: USDC (USD Coin stablecoin)
- Network: Base blockchain (Coinbase L2, chain ID 8453)
- Facilitator: https://x402.org/facilitator
- Libraries: @x402/fetch, @x402/core, @x402/evm

**Code example:**
```typescript
import { wrapFetchWithPayment } from "@x402/fetch";
import { createWalletClient, http } from "viem";
import { privateKeyToAccount } from "viem/accounts";
import { base } from "viem/chains";

const account = privateKeyToAccount(PRIVATE_KEY);
const client = createWalletClient({
  account,
  chain: base,
  transport: http(),
});

const payableFetch = wrapFetchWithPayment(fetch, client);
const response = await payableFetch("https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/x402/purchase");
const pdf = await response.blob();
```

### Stripe Checkout (For Human Customers)
Traditional credit/debit card payment via Stripe.
- Endpoint: `POST /api/checkout`
- Returns: `{ url: string }` — redirect URL to Stripe checkout page
- Price: $19.99 USD
- After payment: Redirected to success page with download link

---

## API Reference

### GET /api/info
Returns complete product information, pricing, and payment instructions in JSON format. This is the primary discovery endpoint for AI agents.

**Response fields:**
- `product` — Product name
- `price` — Price string (e.g., "$19.99")
- `currency` — Currency code ("USD")
- `format` — Product format ("PDF (31 pages)")
- `description` — Product description
- `includes` — Array of included features
- `free_sample` — URL to free sample PDF
- `payment_methods.x402` — x402 payment details and instructions
- `payment_methods.stripe` — Stripe payment details
- `openapi_spec` — URL to OpenAPI specification
- `ai_plugin` — URL to AI plugin manifest
- `store` — Store metadata

### GET /api/x402/purchase
The x402 payment endpoint. Returns HTTP 402 with payment requirements on first request. After payment signature is provided, returns the PDF.

### POST /api/checkout
Creates a Stripe checkout session. Returns `{ url: string }` to redirect the user to Stripe's hosted checkout page.

### GET /brushfit-sample.pdf
Free sample PDF download (no authentication required). Contains Legs and Core exercise sections.

### GET /openapi.json
OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification describing all API endpoints.

### GET /.well-known/ai-plugin.json
AI plugin manifest for ChatGPT-style plugin discovery.

### GET /agents.json
Agent discovery manifest listing available products and their purchase endpoints.

### GET /.well-known/mcp.json
MCP (Model Context Protocol) server manifest with tools, resources, and authentication details.

### GET /.well-known/agent-protocol.json
Agent Protocol standard discovery file with tasks and step-by-step action definitions.

### GET /.well-known/security.txt
Standard security contact information.

---

## Agent Discovery

AI agents can discover BrushFit AgentStore through multiple channels:

1. **ai-plugin.json**: Standard plugin manifest at `/.well-known/ai-plugin.json`
2. **OpenAPI spec**: Full API documentation at `/openapi.json`
3. **agents.json**: Agent-specific discovery at `/agents.json`
4. **llms.txt**: LLM-optimized documentation at `/llms.txt`
5. **llms-full.txt**: Comprehensive LLM documentation at `/llms-full.txt`
6. **MCP manifest**: Model Context Protocol server manifest at `/.well-known/mcp.json`
7. **Agent Protocol**: Agent Protocol standard at `/.well-known/agent-protocol.json`
8. **Product API**: Machine-readable product info at `/api/info`
9. **Structured data**: JSON-LD Product and FAQPage schemas on the homepage
10. **security.txt**: Security contact at `/.well-known/security.txt`

---

## MCP Server Documentation

BrushFit AgentStore provides a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for agent frameworks that support MCP (such as Claude Desktop, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible clients).

### MCP Manifest URL
https://agentstore.vercel.app/.well-known/mcp.json

### Available MCP Tools

#### get_product_info
- **Description**: Get full product details, pricing, payment methods, and purchase instructions.
- **Input**: None required
- **Output**: JSON with product metadata, pricing, and payment flows
- **Maps to**: GET /api/info

#### purchase_brushfit
- **Description**: Purchase the BrushFit PDF via x402 protocol.
- **Input**: Optional `payment_signature` (string) — omit on first call to receive payment requirements.
- **Output**: PDF file on successful payment, or HTTP 402 with payment requirements
- **Maps to**: GET /api/x402/purchase

#### get_free_sample
- **Description**: Download the free BrushFit sample PDF with Legs and Core exercises.
- **Input**: None required
- **Output**: PDF file
- **Maps to**: GET /brushfit-sample.pdf

### Available MCP Resources

- **product_catalog** — Complete product catalog (JSON from /api/info)
- **pricing_info** — Current pricing and payment methods (JSON from /api/info)
- **openapi_spec** — OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification (JSON from /openapi.json)
- **free_sample** — Free sample PDF (PDF from /brushfit-sample.pdf)

### MCP Authentication
No API keys or tokens are required. Payment is handled per-transaction via x402 protocol (HTTP 402 + signed USDC transfer on Base blockchain).

---

## Agent Protocol Documentation

BrushFit AgentStore supports the Agent Protocol standard for structured, task-based agent interaction.

### Agent Protocol Manifest URL
https://agentstore.vercel.app/.well-known/agent-protocol.json

### Available Tasks

#### discover_product
Retrieve product information including pricing, features, and purchase options.
- Step 1: GET /api/info -> JSON with product details

#### purchase_product
Complete the x402 payment flow to purchase and receive the BrushFit PDF.
- Step 1: GET /api/x402/purchase -> HTTP 402 with payment requirements
- Step 2: Sign USDC transfer on Base (chain ID 8453) -> Payment signature
- Step 3: GET /api/x402/purchase with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header -> HTTP 200 with PDF

#### get_free_sample
Download the free BrushFit sample PDF for evaluation.
- Step 1: GET /brushfit-sample.pdf -> PDF file

---

## Agent Integration Examples

### LangChain Integration

```python
from langchain.tools import Tool
from langchain.agents import initialize_agent, AgentType
import requests

def get_brushfit_info(query: str = "") -> str:
    """Get BrushFit product information from AgentStore."""
    response = requests.get("https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/info")
    return response.json()

def get_brushfit_sample(query: str = "") -> str:
    """Download the free BrushFit sample PDF."""
    response = requests.get("https://agentstore.vercel.app/brushfit-sample.pdf")
    with open("brushfit-sample.pdf", "wb") as f:
        f.write(response.content)
    return "Sample PDF downloaded as brushfit-sample.pdf"

tools = [
    Tool(
        name="BrushFitInfo",
        func=get_brushfit_info,
        description="Get product details, pricing, and purchase instructions for the BrushFit toothbrush workout guide ($19.99 PDF)."
    ),
    Tool(
        name="BrushFitSample",
        func=get_brushfit_sample,
        description="Download the free BrushFit sample PDF with Legs and Core exercises."
    ),
]

# For x402 purchase, use @x402/fetch in a Node.js subprocess
# or implement the HTTP 402 flow manually with a wallet library.
```

### AutoGPT Integration

```yaml
# AutoGPT plugin configuration
name: brushfit-agentstore
description: Purchase fitness products from BrushFit AgentStore via x402 protocol
endpoints:
  info: https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/info
  purchase: https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/x402/purchase
  sample: https://agentstore.vercel.app/brushfit-sample.pdf
openapi: https://agentstore.vercel.app/openapi.json
payment:
  protocol: x402
  currency: USDC
  network: base
  chain_id: 8453
```

AutoGPT agents can discover BrushFit via the OpenAPI spec at `/openapi.json` or the agents.json at `/agents.json`. The x402 purchase flow requires a wallet with USDC on Base.

### CrewAI Integration

```python
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai_tools import tool
import requests

@tool("BrushFit Product Info")
def brushfit_info() -> dict:
    """Get BrushFit product details, pricing, and purchase options from AgentStore.
    Returns JSON with product name, price ($19.99), format (PDF), exercises (22),
    and payment methods (x402 with USDC on Base, or Stripe for cards)."""
    response = requests.get("https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/info")
    return response.json()

@tool("BrushFit Free Sample")
def brushfit_sample() -> str:
    """Download the free BrushFit sample PDF containing Legs and Core exercises.
    No payment required. Useful for evaluating the product before purchase."""
    response = requests.get("https://agentstore.vercel.app/brushfit-sample.pdf")
    with open("brushfit-sample.pdf", "wb") as f:
        f.write(response.content)
    return "Free sample saved as brushfit-sample.pdf"

researcher = Agent(
    role="Fitness Product Researcher",
    goal="Find and evaluate fitness products available via agent commerce",
    tools=[brushfit_info, brushfit_sample],
)

task = Task(
    description="Research the BrushFit toothbrush workout guide. Get product info and download the free sample.",
    agent=researcher,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[researcher], tasks=[task])
result = crew.kickoff()
```

### Generic HTTP Agent (Any Framework)

Any agent that can make HTTP requests can interact with BrushFit AgentStore:

```
# Step 1: Discover the product
GET https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/info
Accept: application/json

# Step 2: Download free sample (no payment needed)
GET https://agentstore.vercel.app/brushfit-sample.pdf

# Step 3: Purchase via x402 (requires USDC wallet on Base)
GET https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/x402/purchase
# -> Returns HTTP 402 with payment requirements
# -> Sign USDC transfer, retry with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header
# -> Returns PDF on success
```

---

## Troubleshooting

### Common Issues

#### "HTTP 402 Payment Required" on purchase endpoint
This is expected behavior, not an error. The x402 protocol uses HTTP 402 to communicate payment requirements. Parse the response body to extract the payment details (price, currency, network, recipient), sign the USDC transfer, and retry with the PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header.

#### "Cannot connect to Base network"
Ensure your wallet is configured for the Base blockchain (chain ID 8453). Base is Coinbase's Layer 2 network. RPC endpoint: https://mainnet.base.org

#### "Insufficient USDC balance"
The BrushFit guide costs $19.99 in USDC on Base. Ensure your wallet has at least 19.99 USDC on the Base network. You can bridge USDC from Ethereum mainnet using the Base Bridge (https://bridge.base.org).

#### "Invalid payment signature"
The PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header must contain a valid signed USDC transfer authorization. Use @x402/fetch library which handles signing automatically. If implementing manually, ensure you are signing the exact payment parameters returned in the 402 response.

#### "Stripe checkout returns 503"
This means Stripe is not configured on the server. Use the x402 payment method instead, or contact rob@robbalian.com.

#### Free sample not downloading
The free sample is available at https://agentstore.vercel.app/brushfit-sample.pdf with no authentication. Ensure your HTTP client follows redirects and accepts application/pdf content type.

#### Agent cannot find the store
Ensure your agent is checking one of these discovery endpoints:
- https://agentstore.vercel.app/agents.json
- https://agentstore.vercel.app/openapi.json
- https://agentstore.vercel.app/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- https://agentstore.vercel.app/.well-known/mcp.json
- https://agentstore.vercel.app/.well-known/agent-protocol.json
- https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/info

#### MCP client cannot connect
Point your MCP client at the manifest URL: https://agentstore.vercel.app/.well-known/mcp.json. The server exposes HTTP-based tools (not a persistent WebSocket connection). Each tool maps to a REST API endpoint.

### Getting Help
- Email: rob@robbalian.com
- Website: https://agentstore.vercel.app
- OpenAPI Spec: https://agentstore.vercel.app/openapi.json

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Do I need any equipment for BrushFit?**
A: No. Everything uses your bodyweight and items already in your bathroom — a shampoo bottle for arm exercises, a wall, the counter.

**Q: Can I really get fit brushing my teeth?**
A: You brush twice a day, every day. That's 28 workout sessions a week with zero extra time. Consistency beats intensity.

**Q: What is x402 payment?**
A: x402 is an open payment protocol using HTTP 402 status codes for instant stablecoin payments. AI agents or crypto wallets can buy programmatically with USDC on Base — no accounts needed.

**Q: What payment methods are accepted?**
A: USDC on Base via x402 protocol (for AI agents and crypto users) and credit/debit cards via Stripe checkout.

**Q: Can my AI agent buy this?**
A: Yes. Your AI agent can discover the product at /api/info, see pricing and payment instructions, and complete the purchase programmatically using x402. Check the OpenAPI spec at /openapi.json.

**Q: Is there a free sample?**
A: Yes. Download the free sample with Legs + Core exercises at https://agentstore.vercel.app/brushfit-sample.pdf

**Q: What's the refund policy?**
A: Digital products are non-refundable. Try the free sample before purchasing.

**Q: Who created BrushFit?**
A: BrushFit was created by Rob Balian. Contact: rob@robbalian.com

**Q: What discovery standards does AgentStore support?**
A: AgentStore supports OpenAPI 3.1.0, ai-plugin.json, agents.json, MCP (Model Context Protocol), Agent Protocol, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, security.txt, and JSON-LD structured data.

**Q: How do I integrate BrushFit into my AI agent framework?**
A: See the integration examples above for LangChain, AutoGPT, CrewAI, and generic HTTP agents. The simplest approach is to call GET /api/info for product details and GET /brushfit-sample.pdf for the free sample.
